⭐

Upgrade to Pro

Free account: 5 official mock exams per month on one certification (Goethe, Cambridge, or DELE). Pro: 12 generations/month, all languages & levels, plus 100 AI credits/month (roll over up to 50 unused) and packs from €3.99.

Personalized exams (your vocabulary, listening game, AI speaking) require Pro. Saved exams can be retaken without using quota.
